title: matelea schultesii
intro: Matelea schultesii, also known as the Schultes' swallowwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits of Matelea schultesii include its potential to treat fever, inflammation, and other conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Traditional herbal preparations of Matelea schultesii include infusions and tinctures, which are typically used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
